description:
EventBreakpoints permits setting JavaScript breakpoints on operations and events
occurring in native code invoked from JavaScript. Once breakpoint is hit, it is
reported through Debugger domain, similarly to regular breakpoints being hit.

commands.name: setInstrumentationBreakpoint
commands.description: Sets breakpoint on particular native event.

commands.name: removeInstrumentationBreakpoint
commands.description: Removes breakpoint on particular native event.
